logs.heading: A0: Starting Jira sync script and monitoring

thoughts: I need to start the Jira sync script as instructed.
The script may take 5-15 minutes, so I'll run it in a separate terminal session with reset=false to keep it running.
After starting, I'll monitor progress by checking the debug log up to 10 times at 30-second intervals.
Once complete or failed, I'll send the appropriate notification based on the outcome.
